column2: Verify successful token generation with valid credentials
column7:
1. Open Postman
2. Set method to POST and URL to https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth
3. Add JSON payload
4. Send request
5. Verify status 200 and token generated

column2: Verify token generation fails with invalid credentials
column7:
1. Open Postman
2. Set method to POST and URL to https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth
3. Add invalid JSON payload
4. Send request
5. Verify status 200 and reason Bad credentials

column2: Verify GET /booking returns all booking IDs
column7:
1. Open Postman
2. Set method to GET and URL to https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking
3. Send request
4. Verify 200 status code and array of IDs

column2: Verify GET /booking/{id} returns booking details for valid ID
column7:
1. Open Postman
2. Set method to GET and URL to https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/1
3. Send request
4. Verify 200 status code and response schema

1. Open Postman
2. Set method to GET and URL to https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/999999
3. Send request
4. Verify 404 status code

column2: Verify POST /booking creates a new booking
column7:
1. Open Postman
2. Set method to POST and URL to https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking
3. Add valid JSON payload
4. Send request
5. Verify 200 and new booking ID

column2: Verify POST /booking handles invalid payloads (missing name)
column7:
1. Open Postman
2. Set method to POST and URL to https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking
3. Add incomplete JSON payload
4. Send request
5. Verify 500 error

column2: Verify PUT /booking/{id} fully updates a booking with valid token
column3: Booking exists and Valid Auth Token
column7:
1. Open Postman
2. Set method to PUT and URL to https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/1
3. Add Cookie header with token
4. Add full JSON payload
5. Send request
6. Verify 200 status

column2: Verify PUT /booking/{id} fails without Auth Token
column7:
1. Open Postman
2. Set method to PUT and URL to https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/1
3. Leave Authorization headers empty
4. Add JSON payload
5. Send request
6. Verify 403 status

column2: Verify PATCH /booking/{id} partially updates a booking
column3: Booking exists and Valid Auth Token
column7:
1. Open Postman
2. Set method to PATCH and URL to https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/1
3. Add Cookie header with token
4. Add partial JSON payload
5. Send request
6. Verify 200 status

column3: Booking exists and Valid Auth Token
column7:
1. Open Postman
2. Set method to DELETE and URL to https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/1
3. Add Cookie header with token
4. Send request
5. Verify 201 status code

column2: Verify DELETE /booking/{id} fails without Auth Token
column7:
1. Open Postman
2. Set method to DELETE and URL to https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/1
3. Leave Authorization headers empty
4. Send request
5. Verify 403 status code

column2: Verify GET /ping health check endpoint returns success
column7:
1. Open Postman
2. Set method to GET and URL to https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/ping
3. Send request
4. Verify 201 status code
